features.claim: The CLI lets users monitor their active AI credit quota and consumption directly inside the tool.
features.name: Quota Tracking
subfeatures: Statusline Indicator: The CLI statusline displays the user's remaining AI credit count in real time.
Low Quota Alert: The CLI highlights the statusline indicator when remaining AI credits drop below a warning threshold.

features.claim: Users can purchase additional AI credits or upgrade their subscription directly from within the CLI.
features.name: Managing Credits
subfeatures: Settings Configuration: Users can toggle whether the CLI falls back to personal AI credits when plan quotas are exhausted.
